assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AccessTokenType = AccessTokenType.Reference
assertions.rationale: The code sets AccessTokenType = AccessTokenType.Reference on the web_app client.

assertions.assertion: The web_app client has AccessTokenLifetime set to 900 (15 minutes)
assertions.rationale: AccessTokenLifetime = 900 is explicitly set with a comment noting 15 minutes.

assertions.assertion: The ApiResource api1_resource has ApiSecrets with at least one Secret configured
assertions.rationale: The ApiResource has ApiSecrets = { new Secret("api1_secret".Sha256()) }.
The secret uses .Sha256() hashing as shown in the code.
